scripts.install: cd backend && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.backend: concurrently --names 'api,worker,beat' --prefix-colors 'cyan,yellow,magenta' "cd backend && .venv/bin/python manage.py runserver" "cd backend && .venv/bin/celery -A config worker --loglevel=info --concurrency=4" "cd backend && .venv/bin/celery -A config beat --loglevel=info --scheduler django_celery_beat.schedulers:DatabaseScheduler"
scripts.test: cd backend && .venv/bin/python manage.py test tests.test_concurrency tests.test_idempotency
